alert.name: LLMWatch Quality Regression
alert.search: index=llmwatch sourcetype=llm_events | timechart span=15m avg(groundedness_score) as quality by model_version | untable _time model_version quality | streamstats window=4 avg(quality) as rolling_avg by model_version | where quality < rolling_avg*0.85 | eval message="Quality dropped ".round((1-(quality/rolling_avg))*100,1)."% on ".model_version
